response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the minimum educational requirement (Bachelor's degree + 14 years experience), they lack fundamental domain expertise for this hardware-focused role. Their entire background is application-level software development with no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI workload optimization, GPU architecture, or hardware performance analysis—all core responsibilities. The role requires deep expertise in deep learning optimization and hardware co-design, not general software engineering.
strengths: Exceeds minimum qualification threshold: Bachelor's degree completed 2012, ~14 years professional experience
Proven systems-level thinking: optimized microservices handling millions of requests/second and built real-time low-latency systems at Dunnhumby
Senior IC track record: multiple Staff/Principal engineer roles demonstrate architecture and leadership capability
concerns: Zero domain expertise in AI/deep learning: mentions 'AI-agent infrastructure' at re:cinq but no evidence of neural network training, inference optimization, or workload analysis
No hardware or SoC experience: entire career is application software development; lacks required background in IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, and SoC/architecture optimization
Missing GPU and accelerator knowledge: no mentioned experience with GPU architecture, tensor optimization, SIMD/MIMD systems, or hardware performance modeling

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
Proven senior IC seniority and systems thinking
